system.notes:
Full Body Conversion (Chromebook 2). Whole-body cyborg chassis: takes Structural Damage per zone, not the human wound track - Head or Torso destroyed = the borg dies. SP 40 all zones; SDP disabled/destroyed = Head/limbs 40/50, Torso 50/60.

Option spaces: Head optic 0&0, audio 0; Torso 0; R.Arm 4/L.Arm 4; R.Leg 2/L.Leg 2.

Prebuilt options: 5-optic front mount; twin sensory booms; sniffer/sonar/radar/radiation detector; ALL FOUR limbs on Quick-Change weapon mounts (.22 -> railcannon); interchangeable biopod + behavioral inhibitor; chipware socket; pain editor; ambidexterity sub-processor; combat crystal; IR thermal dam; black-box recorder; environmental assimilation (24 camo); autoinjector; ammo hopper (20x mag); locator beacon; IFF transponder; satellite link + GPS; micro-computer; EMP shielding.

loadout.name: Front Optic Mount
loadout.description: Front optic mount — holds up to five cyberoptics. Ships with Night-Vision, Thermal, Long-Range, IR-Vision, and Heads-Up (each also carries Image Enhancement, Anti-Dazzle, and a Targeting Scope). Swap optics in and out via the mount.

loadout.name: Night-Vision Optic
loadout.description: Night-Vision cyberoptic (with Image Enhancement, Anti-Dazzle, Targeting Scope) mounted in the front optic mount.

loadout.name: Thermal Optic
loadout.description: Thermal cyberoptic (with Image Enhancement, Anti-Dazzle, Targeting Scope) mounted in the front optic mount.

loadout.name: Long-Range Optic
loadout.description: Long-Range cyberoptic (with Image Enhancement, Anti-Dazzle, Targeting Scope) mounted in the front optic mount.

loadout.name: IR-Vision Optic
loadout.description: IR-Vision cyberoptic (with Image Enhancement, Anti-Dazzle, Targeting Scope) mounted in the front optic mount.

loadout.name: Heads-Up Optic
loadout.description: Heads-Up Display cyberoptic (with Image Enhancement, Anti-Dazzle, Targeting Scope) mounted in the front optic mount.

loadout.name: Amplified Hearing (Level Damper, Enhanced Range)
loadout.description: Amplified Hearing with Level Damper and Enhanced Range, in a chassis audio socket. Carries the HC 5 for the whole factory cyberaudio package (this suite, the Long-Range Radio, and the Radar Detector).

loadout.name: Long-Range Radio (25km, 6-freq, Scrambler)
loadout.description: Long-Range Radio: 25km range, 6 frequencies, Scrambler. HC shared with the factory cyberaudio package (carried by the Amplified Hearing suite).

loadout.name: Radar Detector
loadout.description: Radar detector. HC shared with the factory cyberaudio package (carried by the Amplified Hearing suite).

loadout.name: Right Sensory Boom
loadout.description: Right extensible sensory boom — holds up to three optic/audio options (ships with the Video/Audio Transmitter; one space free). Twin Sensory Booms package HC 6 total: the boom pair carries 1 here; the factory contents carry the rest.

loadout.name: Video/Audio Transmitter
loadout.description: Video and audio transmitter mounted in the right sensory boom.

loadout.name: Left Sensory Boom
loadout.description: Left extensible sensory boom — holds up to three optic/audio options (ships with the Video Imager and Tight-Beam Radio Link; one space free). HC shared with the Twin Sensory Booms package (carried by the right boom).

loadout.name: Video Imager
loadout.description: Video imager mounted in the left sensory boom. Carries the HC 3 for the left boom's factory pair (Video Imager + Tight-Beam Radio Link).

loadout.name: Tight-Beam Radio Link
loadout.description: Tight-beam radio link mounted in the left sensory boom. HC shared with the Video Imager (left-boom factory pair).

loadout.name: Sniffer
loadout.description: Olfactory Booster and Chemical Analyzer.

loadout.name: Sonar Scanner
loadout.description: 120m motion-sensing sonar scanner.

loadout.name: Radar Sensor
loadout.description: 1km radar sensor.

loadout.name: Radiation Detector
loadout.description: 10m radiation detector.

loadout.name: Quick-Change Weapon Mount (Right Arm)
loadout.description: Right-arm quick-change weapon mount (.22 through grenade launcher / railcannon). No weapon pre-installed.

loadout.name: Quick-Change Weapon Mount (Left Arm)
loadout.description: Left-arm quick-change weapon mount (.22 through grenade launcher / railcannon). No weapon pre-installed.

loadout.name: Quick-Change Weapon Mount (Right Leg)
loadout.description: Right-leg quick-change weapon mount. No weapon pre-installed.

loadout.name: Quick-Change Weapon Mount (Left Leg)
loadout.description: Left-leg quick-change weapon mount. No weapon pre-installed.

loadout.name: Interchangeable Biopod + Behavioral Inhibitor
loadout.description: Interchangeable biopod (transferable brain housing) with a behavioral inhibitor.

loadout.name: Chipware Socket
loadout.description: Chipware socket.

loadout.name: Pain Editor
loadout.description: Pain editor.

loadout.name: Ambidexterity Sub-Processor
loadout.description: Ambidexterity sub-processor.

loadout.name: Combat Crystal
loadout.description: Coordinates 5+ Dragoons: +1 Initiative/Attack, +2 Awareness/Defense when linked.

loadout.name: IR Thermal Dampening
loadout.description: Infrared thermal dampening.

loadout.name: Black Box Recorder
loadout.description: Black-box event recorder.

loadout.name: Environmental Assimilation
loadout.description: 24 camouflage patterns; -2 to others' Awareness to spot.

loadout.name: Autoinjector
loadout.description: Autoinjector loaded with psychoactives.

loadout.name: Ammo Hopper
loadout.description: Ammo hopper (20x magazine capacity).

loadout.name: Locator Beacon
loadout.description: 100km locator beacon.

loadout.name: IFF Transponder
loadout.description: Identify-friend-or-foe transponder.

loadout.name: Satellite Link + GPS
loadout.description: Satellite uplink with GPS.

loadout.name: Micro-Computer
loadout.description: Onboard micro-computer.

loadout.name: EMP/Microwave Shielding
loadout.description: EMP and microwave shielding.

loadout.name: Chronometer
loadout.description: Internal chronometer.
